title: Lawful Basis and Purpose Register
description: Maintain a register that records, for each processing activity, its purpose and the lawful basis relied on, and keep it current.

tasks.title: Document processing purposes
tasks.description: List each category of PII processed and the specific purpose it is processed for.

tasks.title: Record the lawful basis per purpose
tasks.description: Assign and document a lawful basis for each purpose and review when purposes change.

title: Consent Management
description: Operate a process to determine when consent is required, obtain it, evidence it, and allow individuals to modify or withdraw it.

tasks.title: Define consent capture points
tasks.description: Identify where consent is required and design granular, purpose-specific capture.

tasks.title: Retain consent records
tasks.description: Store evidence of consent and provide a mechanism to withdraw or change it.

title: Privacy Impact Assessment
description: Assess the privacy impact of new or changed high-risk processing before it begins and record the outcome.

tasks.title: Trigger a PIA for high-risk processing
tasks.description: Screen new processing and run a privacy impact assessment where the risk is high.

tasks.title: Track PIA remediation
tasks.description: Record identified risks and follow mitigations through to closure.

title: Records of Processing Activities
description: Maintain records of processing carried out as a controller and as a processor on behalf of customers.

tasks.title: Compile the RoPA
tasks.description: Record processing activities, categories of data and recipients.

tasks.title: Review the RoPA periodically
tasks.description: Reconcile the records against actual processing at least annually.

title: Data Subject Rights Handling
description: Receive, verify and fulfil individuals' access, correction, erasure, objection and copy requests within required timescales.

tasks.title: Operate a request intake channel
tasks.description: Provide and monitor a channel for data-subject requests and verify identity.

tasks.title: Fulfil requests within SLA
tasks.description: Action access, correction, erasure and objection requests and log the outcome.

title: Privacy Notice and Transparency
description: Determine the privacy information individuals should receive and provide it clearly at the appropriate time.

tasks.title: Maintain the privacy notice
tasks.description: Keep the privacy notice accurate and aligned to actual processing.

tasks.title: Surface notices at collection
tasks.description: Present the relevant privacy information where PII is collected.

title: Data Minimization and Retention
description: Collect and process only necessary PII, set minimization objectives, and delete or de-identify PII at the end of its retention.

tasks.title: Set a retention schedule
tasks.description: Define retention periods per data category and enforce them.

tasks.title: Delete or de-identify at end of purpose
tasks.description: Remove or de-identify PII when the processing purpose ends.

title: Processor and Sub-processor Management
description: Bind processors and sub-processors by contract, disclose sub-processors, and manage changes with the customer.

tasks.title: Put processing agreements in place
tasks.description: Ensure written agreements bind processors to privacy obligations.

tasks.title: Maintain the sub-processor list
tasks.description: Disclose sub-processors and notify customers of changes.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Governance
description: Establish and document a lawful basis for cross-border transfers of PII and the jurisdictions to which it may flow.

tasks.title: Map cross-border data flows
tasks.description: Identify where PII is transferred and the jurisdictions involved.

tasks.title: Document the transfer basis
tasks.description: Record the safeguard or basis relied on for each transfer.

title: Privacy Breach Handling
description: Extend incident management to detect, assess and notify personal-data breaches to authorities and affected individuals.

tasks.title: Define a personal-data breach playbook
tasks.description: Extend the incident process with breach assessment and notification steps.

tasks.title: Run a breach notification drill
tasks.description: Exercise the authority (72h) and data-subject notification paths.
